user_query: I'm planning a family reunion and want to make it memorable. Can you recommend some outdoor locations in the countryside that are perfect for a picnic? Also, suggest some engaging activities and games that both kids and adults can enjoy.

TaskList.description: Research outdoor picnic locations in the countryside suitable for family gatherings.
Compile a list of engaging outdoor activities and games for families, including options for both kids and adults.
Create a final report combining the picnic locations and suggested activities.
